title: Zapier cannot retrieve board column data from Monday.com API
excerpt:
Hello,   
Currently Zapier cannot access column data within Monday.com boards. I’ve shown screenshots below of the only fields which can be called and viewed within the app for any unsuspecting users who may be looking t…

posts.author: Finacta (James Holmes)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,


Currently Zapier cannot access column data within Monday.com boards. I’ve shown screenshots below of the only fields which can be called and viewed within the app for any unsuspecting users who may be looking to adopt Monday.com with the understanding they will actually be able to use Zapier to automate things - you won’t be able to currently! A ticket has been raised with Monday.com but so far no response. Zapier stated that the issue is at Monday.com side. See below images:


Zapier Monday.com API call Page 11672×1043 136 KB


Zapier Monday.com API call Page 21670×1044 134 KB

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Finacta

Welcome to the community. Are you sure there is a monday.com issue with Zapier and Integromat? I just tested one of my existing Integromat scenarios and it is working perfectly fine. See history output.

image1467×206 7.16 KB

posts.author: Finacta (James Holmes)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Basdebruin,

Thanks for challenging this. You are right, I’ve re-checked Integromat and it is OK, apologies. However, Zapier does not appear to be OK. Maybe it’s user error because I don’t see other folks complaining about this, but I cannot seem to retrieve column fields within Zapier. I’ve edited the original post accordingly.

Thanks !

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml: From what I have seen, Integromat has a more complete implementation of the monday V2 API than Zapier.

posts.author: AlexSavchuk (Alex Savchuk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey three @Finacta

That does seem quite odd! I’d have to agree with @JCorrell, to me personally Integromat seemed like the option that would provide more features is and choices in your case. Just to clarify your Zapier issue here, what kind of column are you trying to query? It seems to be a Status column, is that correct? I want to make sure I’m not missing anything so I can test this on my end as well.

@basdebruin thanks for stepping in and sharing your results, I’m glad to see this helped move the post forward.

-Alex

posts.author: oboothhowe (Olivia Booth-Howe)
posts.cookedHtml:
Finacta:

ver, Zapier does not appear to be OK. Maybe it’s user error because I don’t see othe

What’s Integromat used for? I am having the same issue as OP but will that help?

posts.author: AnthonytheEngineer (Anthony Gude)
posts.cookedHtml: Working just fine for me too, I also prefer Integromat.

posts.author: Jess-Robertson (JESSICA ROBERTSON)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’ve been having this same issue in Zapier: I have a trigger based on a Specific Column Value changes, but when I try to add data from the row, all I have options for is the change data that the trigger is based on.

All of my other automations are in Zapier, and I’ve never used Integromat, so I would love a solution to this in Zapier… Fingers crossed someone has figured this out…

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
